rationale: All three events (A0, EV-001, EV-002) represent standard Ubuntu APT package index refresh requests from linux-01.corp.local to the canonical Ubuntu repository hostnames (archive.ubuntu.com, security.ubuntu.com) using the legitimate Debian APT-HTTP/1.3 user-agent. The URL paths (/ubuntu/dists/bionic/InRelease, bionic-security/InRelease, bionic-updates/InRelease) are exactly the paths fetched during a routine 'apt-get update' run on Ubuntu 18.04 LTS (Bionic). The HTTP 304 Not Modified response on A0 further confirms normal cache-validation behavior. No suspicious destinations, unusual ports, encoded payloads, or anomalous user-agents are present.
